no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The claimed-bead liveness path is already externalized in code: `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go` calls `TouchClaimHeartbeat`, `cli/internal/bead/claim_liveness.go` stores the lease under an ignored runtime path outside `.ddx/beads.jsonl`, and `git grep "Store.Heartbeat|.Heartbeat(candidate.ID)|.Heartbeat(beadID)" cli/internal/agent cli/internal/server` returns no periodic tracker-writing path. Focused verification passed (`go test ./internal/agent/... ./internal/bead/... ./internal/server/... -run "Heartbeat|Liveness|Watchdog|Claim" -count=1`), but the broader `go test ./internal/agent/... ./internal/bead/... ./internal/server/...` run did not complete in the available window, so I cannot complete the full acceptance gate or justify a code change without further investigation.
